zh.lifeSummary: 當Boudewijn II van Gent於大約1062年出生在比利時福拉安德倫時，他的父親Boudewijn de Gent11歲，母親Oda de Avegnes37歲。他於大約1080年與Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand在比利時結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1097年6月13日在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boudewijn II van Gent于大约1062年出生在比利时福拉安德倫时，他的父亲Boudewijn de Gent11岁，母亲Oda de Avegnes37岁。他于大约1080年与Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand在比利时结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1097年6月13日在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Jent
meanings: English: variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.
German:
variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Boudewijn II van Gent was born about 1062, in Flanders, Belgium, his father, Boudewijn de Gent, was 11 and his mother, Oda de Avegnes, was 37. He married Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand about 1080, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 13 June 1097, in İznik, Bursa, Türkiye, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boudewijn II van Gent est né environ 1062, à Flandre, Belgique, son père, Boudewijn de Gent, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Oda de Avegnes, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand environ 1080, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1097, à İznik, Bursa, Turquie, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boudewijn II van Gent um 1062 in Vlaanderen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boudewijn de Gent 11 und seine Mutter Oda de Avegnes 37. Er hat um 1080 in Belgien Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Juni 1097 im Alter von 36 Jahren in İznik, Bursa, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boudewijn II van Gent è nato il circa 1062 nel Vlaanderen, Belgio, il suo padre, Boudewijn de Gent, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Oda de Avegnes, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand circa 1080, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 giugno 1097, nel İznik, Bursa, Turchia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Boudewijn II van Gentが約1062年にベルギーvラアンデレンで生まれた時，父Boudewijn de Gentは11歳，母Oda de Avegnesは37歳であった。約1080年にベルギーでRegnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1097年6月13日にトルコブルサイズニクで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boudewijn II van Gent(이)가 대략 1062년 벨기에 블라아더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boudewijn de Gent(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda de Avegnes(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 벨기에에서 Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1097년 6월 13일 튀르키예 버사 이즈닉에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boudewijn II van Gent nasceu aproximadamente 1062, em Vlaanderen, Bélgica, seu pai, Boudewijn de Gent, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Oda de Avegnes, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand aproximadamente 1080, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1097, em İznik, Bursa, Turquia, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boudewijn II van Gent родился около 1062 г. в местности влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Boudewijn de Gent было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda de Avegnes, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand около 1080 г. в местности Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 июня 1097 г. в местности изник, бурса, Турция в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boudewijn II van Gent nació aproximadamente 1062, en Vlaanderen, Bélgica, su papá, Boudewijn de Gent, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Oda de Avegnes, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Regnevide dit “Reina de Cassel” van Aalst, dame de Gand aproximadamente 1080, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de junio de 1097, en İznik, Bursa, Turquía, a la edad de 36 años.
